name: San Francisco Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size saucepan, sauté onions, carrots, bok choy, and bell pepper in oil over medium heat until the vegetables soften, about 5 minutes.
2. Add water, bouillon powder, ginger, and garlic. Simmer until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add snow peas and cook for one minute. Serve hot.
